2387960.name: Agora Gogo
2387960.description:
Know Thyself


Agora Gogo is an immersive, game-world Learning Management System (LMS) designed for teaching introspection, critical thinking and spirituality using the Socratic Method. Through questioning, students first seek to identify and then defend their beliefs with instructor guidance. Agora Gogo will provide instructors with a blank canvas to create an educational organization. Pick a subject you want to teach. Promote your courses and events. Gain a following. Then populate your world with teachers and students. Think better. Think beautiful.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
